subcodes.first_line: Today ye must be so transported by the divine fragrances of the verses of God and the sweet emanations of the garment of the All-Merciful that no sorrow may seize you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید الیوم از نفحات آیات الهیه و فوحات قمیص رحمانیه بشانی مسرور باشید که حزن او را اخذ
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
